mapper.select:
select p.proj_id, p.proj_no, p.proj_name, p.status, ifnull(p.contract_amount, 0) as contract_amount, ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) as total_budget, ifnull(p.actual_cost, 0) as actual_cost, ifnull(p.budget_balance, ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) - ifnull(p.actual_cost, 0)) as budget_balance, ifnull(p.contract_amount, 0) - ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) as profit_margin, ifnull(sum(case when date_format(coalesce(c.post_time, c.create_time), '%Y-%m') = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m') then c.amount else 0 end), 0) as month_posting_amount, case when ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(ifnull(p.actual_cost, 0) / p.total_budget * 100, 2) end as exec_rate from proj_info p left join cost_posting_record c on c.proj_id = p.proj_id where p.del_flag = '0'
and p.status in #{status}
and (p.proj_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.proj_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
group by p.proj_id, p.proj_no, p.proj_name, p.status, p.contract_amount, p.total_budget, p.actual_cost, p.budget_balance order by exec_rate desc, month_posting_amount desc, p.create_time desc
